changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md from Chinese to English. Added targeted sections for directory depth calculation, kebab-case rename rules with explicit examples and bash implementation, file content size measurement with wc -c, and JSON output guidance. Removed generic/redundant sections.

Fixed depth calculation guidance to warn against using awk -F/ on absolute paths. Added cd-first approach using relative paths, and alternative base-subtraction method. This fixed the model computing depth=11 (absolute path components) instead of depth=4 (relative depth).
